article.title: HELP | Uber L3 Interview
article.content:
Hi all,

I have upcoming rounds for the following stages:
```
Stage 2: Coding BPS Round (1 hr)

45 min: General coding

15 min: High-Level Design

Stage 3: Business Interviews (3 x 1 hr)

Coding – DSA problems

Low-Level Design

Collaboration & Leadership
```

Would love to know:
```
Difficulty level & type of coding problems for Stage 2 & 3

Common topics for High-Level & Low-Level Design

What’s usually asked in Collaboration & Leadership

Any prep tips/resources
```

Any specific experiences would be super helpful. Thanks!

post.content: Can we connect u have BPS round on 20th right??
Has anyone received an update after the OA?\n
You got the qualification email for round-1?
